assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Phase 4 explicitly shows upgrading control plane first with gcloud container clusters upgrade --master command before any node pool upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Phase 5 clearly specifies upgrade order: Coordinating → Data → Masters with explicit rationale that coordinators are lowest risk and masters highest risk

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Multiple mentions that regional pd-ssd PVs survive node changes and automatically reattach to new nodes, with specific note that they 'survives node migration'

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Phase 2 provides complete PDB YAML with minAvailable: 2 for masters and explicit comment 'Maintains quorum during drain'

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Phase 5 Step 1 shows configuring all three node pools with --max-surge-upgrade 1 --max-unavailable-upgrade 0 with rationale of being conservative

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Multiple curl commands to check cluster health between upgrades, including specific commands like 'curl -X GET localhost:9200/_cluster/health' and verification steps

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Phase 1 checklist and Phase 1 bash commands explicitly check PV reclaim policies with kubectl get pv command to verify all are set to Retain

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Phase 6 includes 'kubectl get statefulsets -A' command to verify StatefulSet ready state post-upgrade

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Phase 3 provides detailed snapshot creation commands and Phase 1 checklist includes 'Snapshot backup completed' as a pre-upgrade requirement
